title: Align AgentOS to the roadmap short horizon only

tasks.title: Close the short-horizon scaffold gaps without implementing medium or long horizon items
tasks.goal: Align the repository with the roadmap short horizon while keeping AgentOS as platform, SpecPilot as engine, Codex as adapter and Generic IDE usable without .codex.

agentGoal.draft: /goal Deliver the AgentOS short-horizon roadmap surface verified by npm run doctor and npm run validate, preserving placeholder-only extensions and packs with no external dependencies.
agentGoal.outcome: The repository exposes the short-horizon core, SpecPilot, workflows, adapters and honest placeholders with updated evidence.
agentGoal.verificationSurface: npm run doctor, npm run validate and docs/REVIEW.md evidence
constraints: Do not implement medium or long horizon features.
Do not introduce databases, dashboards, schedulers, channels or remote runtime.
Do not reintroduce codexGoal in active runtime artifacts.
agentGoal.iterationPolicy: Apply the smallest set of changes that closes the short-horizon acceptance gaps.
agentGoal.blockedStopCondition: Stop after three failed attempts with the same blocker.

acceptanceCriteria: Core exposes a neutral README and does not depend on .codex or .claude.
SpecPilot is explicit through specpilot/ plus existing docs and harness templates.
Canonical short-horizon workflows 01 through 10 exist, including 05-implement, 06-verify, 07-review, 08-release, 09-deploy and 10-retro.
Extensions and packs remain documented placeholders only.
Review evidence records fresh doctor and validate results.

evidence.note: Doctor confirmed the short-horizon required surface, including core/README, specpilot/ and canonical workflow files.
Template, context and secret validation passed with the short-horizon sprint active.
Sprint and task contracts validated with agentGoal and bounded context.
